ReviewsSection.label: Client Reviews
ReviewsSection.title:
Loved by our

clients.
ReviewsSection.description: Don't take our word for it. Here's what our partners have to say about working with us.

1.name: Alex Thompson
1.content: Phuc Thinh transformed our digital presence completely. Their attention to detail and innovative approach to user experience is unlike anything I've seen before. Absolutely elite work.

2.name: Sarah Chen
2.content: Working with the team was a total breeze. They delivered a incredibly complex dashboard on time and with a level of polish that we didn't even think was possible.

3.name: James Wilson
3.content: The best creative & tech team in the region, no contest. Their ability to blend deep-tech functionality and peak aesthetics is what truly sets them apart from everyone else.

4.name: Emily Rodriguez
4.content: Stunning visuals and seamless user journeys. Our conversion rates increased by 40% after the redesign of our landing pages. The ROI has been exceptional.

5.name: Michael Bauer
5.content: As an experienced designer myself, I'm incredibly picky about who I work with. But Phuc Thinh exceeded every one of my expectations with pixel-perfect execution and beautiful motion design.

6.name: David Miller
6.content: Reliable, beautifully scalable, and visually elite. Their code architecture is as clean and robust as their design is breathtakingly beautiful. Highly, highly recommended.

1.title: The Future of UI Design: Glassmorphism & Beyond
1.excerpt: Exploring how modern aesthetics like glassmorphism are reshaping the way we perceive digital interfaces and what comes next.

2.title: Building High-Performance Next.js Applications
2.excerpt: Deep dive into server components, streaming, and edge rendering to push your Next.js app to its absolute performance limits.

3.title: AI-Driven Personalization in Modern SaaS Products
3.excerpt: How leading SaaS companies are leveraging machine learning to create hyper-personalized user experiences at scale.

4.title: Why Motion Design is the New Competitive Advantage
4.excerpt: Micro-animations and thoughtful transitions aren't just aesthetic — they directly impact conversion rates and user retention.

5.title: Scaling a Creative Agency from 0 to $1M ARR
5.excerpt: The real story behind growing a boutique creative agency, the mistakes we made, and the three pivots that changed everything.

6.title: The Web3 UX Problem Nobody Is Talking About
6.excerpt: Blockchain technology is evolving fast, but user experience hasn't kept up. Here's why and what designers can do about it.

FAQSection.title: Frequently <highlight>Asked Questions</highlight>
FAQSection.description: Have a different question? Our team is always here to help you navigate through the process.

0.q: What services does QKIT Software provide?
0.a: We provide comprehensive software development services including: Web Development (React, Next.js), Mobile App Development (Flutter, React Native), UI/UX Design, Cloud/DevOps Solutions, and AI/Machine Learning integration.

1.q: How does the project initiation process work?
1.a: Our process starts with requirement gathering, solution consulting, quoting, UI/UX design, software development, testing, and finally delivery/operation. Our technical team can start working within just 2 business days.

2.a: Yes, we provide professional staff augmentation models including Designers and Developers (Web/Mobile/Fullstack) on an hourly or monthly basis to suit your project scale.

3.a: Absolutely. We are committed to long-term technical support and maintenance after project delivery to ensure systems remain stable and updated with the latest technology trends.

4.q: How can I get a project quote?
4.a: You can fill out our contact form or email us directly. Our expert team will respond with a consultation and preliminary quote within 24 hours.

5.a: Yes, we work with global partners from Singapore, Australia, US, and Europe. Our workflow and communication are optimized for international time zones and requirements.

6.q: How are project development costs calculated?
6.a: Costs depend on the project's complexity, scope, and timeline. We offer flexible models: Fixed Price for clear requirements or Time & Materials (T&M) for more agile projects.

7.a: We strictly follow international data security standards such as GDPR. Every project starts with a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) and is deployed on the most secure cloud infrastructures.

8.q: Will I own the source code after the project?
8.a: Absolutely. Upon completion of contractual obligations, the client owns the full source code, design documentation, and all associated digital assets of the project.

hero.subtitle: FAQ
hero.title: Need <highlight>Support?</highlight>
hero.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our services, recruitment process, and technical collaboration at QKIT Software.

0.q: What cooperation models does QKIT Software offer?
0.a: We provide 3 main models: Fixed Price, Time & Materials, and Dedicated Team (Staff Augmentation).

1.q: How to start a project with QKIT?
1.a: Simply send your request via our contact form. We will respond within 24 hours to discuss details and advise on the most optimal solution for you.

2.q: How is software development cost calculated?
2.a: Costs depend on the scope of work, feature complexity, and implementation time. We will provide a detailed quote after analyzing your requirements.

0.q: What is the recruitment process at QKIT?
0.a: The process consists of 4 steps: CV Screening, Technical Interview, Cultural Fit Interview, and Job Offer.

1.q: Do I need to take a technical test?
1.a: It depends on the position. Usually, we have a small test or a deep discussion about real-world projects you've participated in.

2.q: What's special about the work environment at QKIT?
2.a: We value creativity, openness, and flexibility. You'll work in a modern space with a pantry area and many team bonding activities.

0.q: What technologies does QKIT use for development?
0.a: We specialize in React/Next.js for Web, Flutter/React Native for Mobile, and Node.js/Python for Backend. We always stay updated with the latest technologies.

1.q: Are the projects guaranteed to be secure?
1.a: Absolutely. Every project starts with an NDA, and source code is managed on high-security systems.

2.q: Does QKIT support deployment to App Store and Play Store?
2.a: Yes, we support the entire process from submitting apps to stores, CI/CD configuration, until the app is stable in the production environment.
